requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light and UV Hazard (AS/NZS 62471)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光与紫外危害（AS/NZS 62471）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光與紫外危害（AS/NZS 62471）

summary.en: Photobiological safety for LED lighting is addressed through AS/NZS 62471 and, for in-scope LED lamps, through the Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (LED Lamps) Determination 2025 where blue-light or UV hazard test evidence is triggered. The mandatory obligation is the applicable GEMS determination and product safety/supply law; AS/NZS 62471 is the technical hazard assessment route commonly used to classify retinal blue-light, actinic UV, near-UV, and related optical radiation risks.
summary.zh: LED 照明的光生物安全通常通过 AS/NZS 62471 处理；对纳入范围的 LED 灯，当《2025 年温室气体与能源最低标准（LED 灯）决定》触发蓝光或紫外危害测试证据时，还须按该决定执行。强制义务来自适用 GEMS 决定及产品安全/供应法律；AS/NZS 62471 是通常用于评估视网膜蓝光、光化学紫外、近紫外及相关光辐射风险的技术路径。
summary.zht: LED 照明的光生物安全通常通過 AS/NZS 62471 處理；對納入範圍的 LED 燈，當《2025 年溫室氣體與能源最低標準（LED 燈）決定》觸發藍光或紫外危害測試證據時，還須按該決定執行。強制義務來自適用 GEMS 決定及產品安全/供應法律；AS/NZS 62471 是通常用於評估視網膜藍光、光化學紫外、近紫外及相關光輻射風險的技術路徑。

standards_or_laws: Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (LED Lamps) Determination 2025
AS/NZS 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 20145 for photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems, with additional product-specific performance or safety standards depending on the LED lighting category. Chinese risk-group reports may be technically useful but must be checked against AS/NZS 62471 methods and the Australian determination's trigger conditions.
summary.zh: 中国通常参考 GB/T 20145 处理灯和灯系统的光生物安全，并视 LED 照明类别适用其他产品性能或安全标准。中国风险组报告可作为技术参考，但须按 AS/NZS 62471 方法及澳大利亚决定中的触发条件复核。
summary.zht: 中國通常參考 GB/T 20145 處理燈和燈系統的光生物安全，並視 LED 照明類別適用其他產品性能或安全標準。中國風險組報告可作為技術參考，但須按 AS/NZS 62471 方法及澳洲決定中的觸發條件覆核。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems

gap.en: Australian GEMS documentation may require the highest-CCT model or highest-UV-output model to support family registration. The China report may not identify the same worst-case variant, measurement geometry, spectral range, or exemption trigger. Reassess blue-light and UV evidence for the exact Australian family and packaging claims.
gap.zh: 澳大利亚 GEMS 文件可能要求以最高 CCT 型号或最高紫外输出型号支持系列注册。中国报告可能未识别相同最不利型号、测量几何、光谱范围或豁免触发条件。应针对澳大利亚精确系列及包装声明重新评估蓝光和紫外证据。
gap.zht: 澳洲 GEMS 文件可能要求以最高 CCT 型號或最高紫外輸出型號支持系列註冊。中國報告可能未識別相同最不利型號、測量幾何、光譜範圍或豁免觸發條件。應針對澳洲精確系列及包裝聲明重新評估藍光和紫外證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where triggered by the GEMS LED Lamps Determination or product safety duties; AS/NZS 62471 is the common technical assessment route
mandatory_status.cn: Product-dependent — GB/T 20145 risk assessment is commonly used for Chinese technical files

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat AS/NZS 62471 evidence as part of the Australian technical file and, for covered LED lamps, the GEMS registration package. Do not assume GB/T 20145 reports automatically satisfy Australian blue-light or UV documentation triggers.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 AS/NZS 62471 证据作为澳大利亚技术文件的一部分；对被覆盖 LED 灯，还应纳入 GEMS 注册资料。不得假设 GB/T 20145 报告自动满足澳大利亚蓝光或紫外文件触发条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 AS/NZS 62471 證據作為澳洲技術文件的一部分；對被覆蓋 LED 燈，還應納入 GEMS 註冊資料。不得假設 GB/T 20145 報告自動滿足澳洲藍光或紫外文件觸發條件。
